## Summary

## Testing

- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm run test`
- [ ] `npm run build`

## Security and Docs

- [ ] No secrets, generated artifacts, logs, or private data are included.
- [ ] Environment, architecture, command, or security docs were updated if behavior changed.
- [ ] API/schema/security-sensitive changes were reviewed carefully.
